channel.title: DailyBite — Daily Food Deals
channel.description: The best verified food deals, updated every morning.

item.title: Domino's: $9.99 Any Large Pizza — Any Crust, Up to 7 Toppings
item.guid: Domino's-$9.99 Any Large Pizza — Any Crust, Up to-2026-07-08
item.description: Order online or in the Domino's app to get any large pizza with up to 7 toppings on any crust (including Parmesan Stuffed Crust) for $9.99. (Through July 26, 2026)

item.title: Panera Bread: BOGO Sandwich, Salad or Bowl for $5 — Code BOGO5
item.guid: Panera Bread-BOGO Sandwich, Salad or Bowl for $5 — Co-2026-07-08
item.description: Buy one whole sandwich, salad, Market Bowl, Salad Stuffer, or soup at Panera and get a second for just $5 with promo code BOGO5 at checkout. (Limited time)

item.title: Panera Bread: Mix & Match $4.99 Half-Portions Menu
item.description: Save about 40% off regular prices by ordering half-portion soups, sandwiches, and salads from Panera's Mix & Match $4.99 menu — up to 10 items per order. (Ongoing)

item.title: Popeyes: $6 Big Box — 2-Pc Chicken or 3-Pc Tenders + 2 Sides + Biscuit
item.guid: Popeyes-$6 Big Box — 2-Pc Chicken or 3-Pc Tender-2026-07-08
item.description: Grab the Popeyes $6 Big Box with 2 pieces of Signature Chicken or 3 Tenders, two regular sides, and a biscuit — available in the app. (Through July 13, 2026)

item.title: Sonic: America's $2.50 Menu — Hot Dog, Jr Double Cheeseburger & Onion Rings
item.guid: Sonic-America's $2.50 Menu — Hot Dog, Jr D-2026-07-08
item.description: Sonic is celebrating America's 250th birthday with the 6" All-American Dog, Jr. Double Cheeseburger, and Medium Onion Rings each priced at $2.50. (Through July 12, 2026)

item.title: Subway: Moana Movie Meal Deal — Upgrade Any Combo for $1, Get Collectible Cup + $15 Fandango Code
item.guid: Subway-Moana Movie Meal Deal — Upgrade Any Comb-2026-07-08
item.description: Upgrade any Subway combo meal for $1 to receive one of five collectible Moana cups and a $15 Fandango promo code to see the movie in theaters. (Limited time)

item.title: Subway: 6" Sub of the Day + Chips or Cookie + Drink for $6.99
item.guid: Subway-6" Sub of the Day + Chips or Cookie-2026-07-08
item.description: Every day at Subway, get the featured 6-inch sub of the day bundled with chips or a cookie and a drink for just $6.99. (Ongoing)

item.title: Taco Bell: Cravings Value Menu — 10 Items at $3 or Less
item.guid: Taco Bell-Cravings Value Menu — 10 Items at $3 or -2026-07-08
item.description: Taco Bell's Cravings Value Menu offers 10 items including burritos, nachos, and more for $3 or less, available every day through the app or in-store. (Ongoing)

item.title: Taco Bell: Luxe Cravings Box — Chalupa Supreme + Burrito + Taco + Chips + Drink for $7
item.guid: Taco Bell-Luxe Cravings Box — Chalupa Supreme + Bu-2026-07-08
item.description: Get a Chalupa Supreme, Beefy 5-Layer Burrito, Double Stacked Taco, chips and nacho cheese sauce, and a medium fountain drink for $7. (Limited time)

item.title: KFC: $5 Chicken Tenders Box
item.description: Get a box of KFC Chicken Tenders for $5 when you order online or through the KFC app at participating locations. (Limited time)

item.title: Dunkin': Limited-Edition Eagle Cup ($10.99) — Includes Free Medium Beverage
item.description: Dunkin' is selling a limited-edition Eagle Cup for $10.99 that comes with a free medium beverage and a code for one $3 medium Zero drink or Refresher per day for 30 days. (While supplies last)

item.title: El Pollo Loco: Fresca Menu — Lighter Items Under 500 Calories (Drive-Thru Available)
item.guid: El Pollo Loco-Fresca Menu — Lighter Items Under 500 Ca-2026-07-08
item.description: El Pollo Loco's Fresca line of wraps, smaller bowls, and salads clocks in under 500 calories each and is available through the drive-thru or app order at all locations. (Ongoing)

item.title: Panera Bread: Value Duet — Cup of Soup + Half Sandwich for $6.99
item.guid: Panera Bread-Value Duet — Cup of Soup + Half Sandwich-2026-07-08
item.description: Every day at Panera, pair a cup of soup with a half sandwich from select combos (like Greek Salad + Tomato Soup) for just $6.99, no coupon needed. (Ongoing)
